title: Robert J. McGrath
text: Robert J. McGrath earned his PhD in political science from the University of Iowa and holds a BA from Saint Peter’s College. He was a Robert Wood Johnson Foundation Scholar in Health Policy Research at the University of Michigan from 2013 to 2015.

title: Robert J. McGrath
text:
Research Interests
His research spans American politics, legislative institutions, public administration, health policy, and federalism. He studies state-level political dynamics, policy spillovers, and the opioid crisis, with a focus on how political institutions shape policy outcomes across levels of government.
